member.name: T:ArenaNet.SDK.AuthService
member.summary: Service responsible for handling user authentication, including login, registration, and session recovery.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.AuthService.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticates a user with a username and password and initializes the session.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.AuthService.ReconnectAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Restores an existing session using a JWT token.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.AuthService.RegisterAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Registers a new user account with the provided credentials.

member.name: T:ArenaNet.SDK.LeaderboardService
member.summary: Service for retrieving player rankings and match history.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LeaderboardService.GetLeaderboardAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the global leaderboard of top players.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LeaderboardService.GetMatchHistoryAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the recent match history for the current player.

member.name: T:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService
member.summary: Service for managing lobbies, player readiness, and game sessions.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService.CreateLobbyAsync(System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new lobby and returns the lobby ID.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService.JoinLobbyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Joins an existing lobby by its ID.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService.LeaveLobbyAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Leaves the currently connected lobby.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService.SetReadyAsync(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the ready state of the current player in the lobby.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.LobbyService.KickPlayerAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Kicks a specific player from the lobby (Host only).

member.name: T:ArenaNet.SDK.MatchmakingService
member.summary: Service for handling matchmaking queues and match found events.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.MatchmakingService.JoinQueueAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Joins the global matchmaking queue. Number of opponents to search for, or -1 for 'Any' match size.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.MatchmakingService.LeaveQueue
member.summary: Leaves the matchmaking queue.

member.name: T:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService
member.summary: Service for handling friends and party features.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.GetFriendsAsync
member.summary: Retrieves the list of friends for the current player.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.SendFriendRequest(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends a friend request to a specific player ID.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.AcceptFriendRequest(System.Int32)
member.summary: Accepts a pending friend request from a player.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.CreateParty
member.summary: Creates a new party.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.InviteToParty(System.Int32)
member.summary: Invites a player to the current party.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.AcceptPartyInvite(System.String)
member.summary: Accepts a party invite.

member.name: M:ArenaNet.SDK.SocialService.LeaveParty
member.summary: Leaves the current party.
